Morocco • Northern Africa

Sahara Dunes

Desert camps, camel routes, and one of Morocco’s most iconic landscape experiences.

★ 4.6 611 reviews
Image slot Attraction Sahara Dunes
Image slot Country Morocco
Image slot Region Northern Africa

About this attraction

The Sahara section works best for travelers prepared for long road transfers in exchange for cinematic desert scenery and an overnight camp experience.

How to get there

Most routes reach the dunes by private overland itinerary through the Atlas or by combining flights and transfers via Ouarzazate or Errachidia.

Best time to visit

November to March is the most comfortable time for desert nights and daytime touring.

Highlights

  • Independent landing page with a clear planning summary
  • Nearby accommodation and dining recommendations
  • External booking CTA connected to a partner page
  • Practical access and timing guidance before booking

Practical information

Use this page to understand arrival logistics, time commitment, where to stay nearby, and which local tour operators are best placed to support the experience.

Full description

The Sahara section works best for travelers prepared for long road transfers in exchange for cinematic desert scenery and an overnight camp experience. Trek Africa Guide positions this as a practical planning page, so travelers can compare route logic, nearby stays, dining, and partner booking options before leaving the site.

Nearby stays

Accommodations near Sahara Dunes

Image slot Stay Desert Luxury Camp

Desert camp

Desert Luxury Camp

A desert camp option for travelers who want the Sahara overnight without presenting it as a quick city excursion.

★ 4.5 (286) From $220 / night
Erg Chebbi dunes, Merzouga area
View Details

Nearby dining

Restaurants near Sahara Dunes

Image slot Restaurant Desert Luxury Camp Dining

Moroccan camp dining

Desert Luxury Camp Dining

In the dunes, the honest dining experience is camp-based rather than a standalone restaurant. The meal is part of the overnight Sahara rhythm.

★ 4.4 (176) $$$
Tagine, couscous, mint tea, and campfire dinners
View Details
